command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '合同编号'
ws['B1'] = '客户'
ws['C1'] = '金额(万元)'
ws['D1'] = '签订日期'
ws['A2'] = 'HT2025001'
ws['B2'] = '星辰科技'
ws['C2'] = 45.0
ws['D2'] = '2025-01-15'
ws['A3'] = 'HT2025002'
ws['B3'] = '明日教育'
ws['C3'] = 28.5
ws['D3'] = '2025-02-08'
ws['A4'] = 'HT2025003'
ws['B4'] = '云帆网络'
ws['C4'] = 92.0
ws['D4'] = '2025-02-20'
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/contract_list.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 从/home/user/Desktop/contract_list.xlsx中找到金额最大的合同，在/home/user/Desktop/contract_notes.txt末尾追加：'最大合同：HT2025003（92万元，客户：云帆网络）'，保存
